## Definition

**Buffers** is introduced in this chapter. The chapter situates buffers within a broader discussion of the organization of matter, including atoms and atomic structure, macronutrients, chemical bonds, chemical reactions, and cell structure. Matter itself is defined as anything that occupies space and has mass, encompassing all things living and non-living.
